nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Diffusion models gradually add noise to data
nodes.description: Diffusion models (DM) are transformer-based generative models that take a piece of data and gradually add noise over time until it is not recognizable, then try to reconstruct the image to its original form.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Diffusion models can be computationally expensive
nodes.description: The issue with DMs is that the powerful ones often consume hundreds of GPU days, and inference is quite expensive due to sequential evaluations.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Diffusion models are applied in the latent space of autoencoders
nodes.description: To enable DM training on limited computational resources without compromising quality, DMs are applied in the latent space of powerful pre-trained autoencoders.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Cross-attention layer improves diffusion model performance
nodes.description: Introducing a cross-attention layer to the model architecture turns the diffusion model into a powerful and flexible generator for generally conditioned inputs such as text and bounding boxes.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Previous studies explored the relationship between L2 Motivational Self-System, self-efficacy, and English achievement
nodes.description: Abundant studies exist on the correlation between L2MSS and English achievement or self-efficacy and English achievement, but few studies simultaneously explore the relationship among L2MSS, self-efficacy, and English learning achievement.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Huo and Rui (2020) investigated interactions between self-efficacy, L2MSS, and English academic proficiency
nodes.description: The study surveyed 239 junior and senior non-English majors in a university in North China, finding that ideal L2 self and L2 learning experience had a mediating effect between self-efficacy and English proficiency.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Ideal L2 self and L2 learning experience had a mediating effect between self-efficacy and English proficiency
nodes.description: Huo and Rui (2020) found that self-efficacy could not significantly impact English proficiency through ought-to L2 self.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Previous studies on L2MSS and self-efficacy primarily focused on high school students in urban areas
nodes.description: These studies used questionnaires to explore learners' levels of L2MSS and self-efficacy, with a limited number of master's theses conducted.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Zhao (2021) and Chen (2022) found high levels of L2MSS among learners
nodes.description: They reported the three dimensions of L2MSS in the order of ideal L2 self > L2 learning experience > ought-to L2 self.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Zhou (2021) found average levels of L2MSS among learners
nodes.description: Zhou reported that the L2 learning experience was the highest among the dimensions of L2MSS.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Previous studies had limitations in research variables and methods
nodes.description: They focused on single variables, primarily used quantitative analysis with questionnaires, and mainly involved non-English major college students and high school students in urban areas.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] This study selected high school students from a rural school in Yibin, Sichuan Province as research participants
nodes.description: The study combined questionnaires and interviews to investigate the correlation between self-efficacy, L2MSS, and English academic achievement.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] This study aims to increase the diversity of the sample in L2MSS research
nodes.description: By selecting students from rural areas, the research aims to make the findings more comprehensive.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Japan has advanced infrastructure for disaster preparedness

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] AquaDom aquarium burst in Radisson Blu hotel lobby in Berlin on December 2023
nodes.description: The AquaDom aquarium, containing a million litres of water, burst in the lobby of the Radisson Blu hotel in Berlin, causing flooding and significant damage.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] AquaDom aquarium was the largest free-standing cylindrical aquarium in the world
nodes.description: The AquaDom aquarium, which was 15.85 meters high and home to 1,500 tropical fish, was described as the largest free-standing cylindrical aquarium in the world.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Two people were injured by falling glass during AquaDom aquarium burst
nodes.description: Two people were injured by falling glass after the AquaDom aquarium burst in the Radisson Blu hotel lobby.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Majority of fish in AquaDom aquarium died after the burst
nodes.description: The vast majority of the 1,500 tropical fish in the AquaDom aquarium died as a result of the burst.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Berlin's fire brigade sent more than 100 firefighters to AquaDom aquarium burst scene
nodes.description: Berlin's fire brigade responded to the AquaDom aquarium burst by sending more than 100 firefighters to the scene.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Freezing temperatures may have caused AquaDom aquarium to burst
nodes.description: Speculation exists that freezing temperatures, which dropped as low as -6C overnight, may have caused a crack in the AquaDom aquarium leading to the burst.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] AquaDom aquarium was modernized two years ago
nodes.description: The AquaDom aquarium was modernized two years prior to the incident.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] AquaDom aquarium opened in December 2003 and cost about €12.8m to build
nodes.description: The AquaDom aquarium was opened in December 2003 and was reported to have cost about €12.8 million to build.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Mayor of Berlin described AquaDom aquarium burst as being like a tsunami
nodes.description: Franziska Giffey, the Mayor of Berlin, visited the hotel and described the AquaDom aquarium burst as being like a tsunami.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Guests were moved out of Radisson Blu hotel after AquaDom aquarium burst
nodes.description: Following the AquaDom aquarium burst at 05:50, guests were moved out of the Radisson Blu hotel.

nodes.title: [2023-05-26] Police closed Karl-Liebknecht street due to flooding from AquaDom aquarium burst
nodes.description: Berlin's public transport authority reported that Karl-Liebknecht street outside the Radisson Blu hotel was closed off due to an extreme amount of water on the road following the AquaDom aquarium burst.
